claims: Durable receipt hydration runs before produce_agentic_worker_receipts
Partial fan-out reuses completed workers and spawns only missing/failed roles
Orphaned/stale workers reaped via PID liveness + timeout from persisted runtime.json
No gate weakened and fan-out remains off by default
confidence_criteria: Live git diff matches expected scope (7 files, 666 ins)
Partial reuse logic spawns only missing roles
Orphan cleanup keyed on PID liveness + timeout
Gates not weakened, fan-out off by default
Tests exist and assert concrete behavior tied to code paths
outcome.confidence_rationale: All three requirements verified line-by-line against live source; tests substantive and signatures/imports/event-whitelist consistent. Confidence capped below 0.9 solely because the test suite has not been executed (sandbox blocks python), leaving a small latent-failure risk.

assumptions_to_verify: The 4 new tests pass when actually run
No other test regressed by the state.py event-kind whitelist addition or executor signature change
contradictions_checked: Prior round-1/2 DENY claimed zero implementation via a stale replay snapshot; refuted by live git diff showing 666 insertions
Verified hydration is not after the producer (would be a no-op): confirmed L551 precedes L616
Verified fan-out not enabled by default: handoff packet policy=off, min_subagents=0
missing_evidence: Actual pytest pass/fail output for the 3 affected test files
critical_review.strongest_objection: The test suite has never been executed in any of the 5 review rounds; correctness rests entirely on static inspection, so a latent runtime failure (async fixture, mock mismatch) cannot be excluded.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: A pytest run showing any of the 4 new tests failing, or discovery that a gate was weakened or fan-out enabled by default.

decisions: ACCEPT — all three requirements verified in live source; hydration ordering correct (hydrate L551 before producer L616); partial reuse spawns only missing roles; orphan reap by PID liveness+timeout; gates not weakened; fan-out off by default
Condition: supervisor must run pytest on the 3 affected test files before merge since harness sandbox blocks all python execution
objections: Test suite has not been executed across 5 review rounds; GREEN is asserted from source+test inspection, not a run

specialists.name: lead-source-verifier
specialists.objection: tests never executed; GREEN by inspection only

outcome.summary: Detached/resumable agentic fan-out fully implemented in working tree (666 ins, 7 files). All three reqs verified line-by-line against live source: durable receipt hydration before producer, partial reuse of completed workers, orphan reap by PID+timeout. Gates not weakened, fan-out off by default, tests substantive RED->GREEN. Only gap: test suite un-run (harness blocks all python). ACCEPT, conditioned on supervisor running pytest pre-merge.

decisions: Condition: supervisor must run pytest on the 3 affected test files before merge since harness sandbox blocks all python execution
